languages.text: {n}Батошски буравит вас тяжелым взглядом, а затем кивает своим мыслям.{/n} "Пришло время обновить нашу присягу. Мы пойдем на площадь и перед именами павших, перед всеми моими людьми, сойдемся в Тренировочном Бою".

{n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."
languages.original_text: {n}Батошски буравит вас тяжелым взглядом, а затем кивает своим мыслям.{/n} "Пришло время обновить нашу присягу. Мы пойдем на площадь и перед именами павших, перед всеми моими людьми, сойдемся в Тренировочном Бою".

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski levels you with a grave look, then nods to his own thoughts.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my men, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

{n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

{n}Batoshski levels you with a grave look, as if coming to some kind of decision. Then he heaves a sigh.{/n} "Alas, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you are a death sentence for the entire regiment. As soon as the Imperium finds out about us, we're all as good as dead. Which means that you are now the biggest threat to us on Zarkov. I'm sorry, {name}, but the only way to protect all these people is to eliminate that threat. To eliminate you."

{n}Batoshski levels you with a grave look, then nods to his own thoughts.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my men, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

{n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーは深刻な顔で、何か決断したかのように言った。{/n}「ああ、御{mf|殿|女}様、御{mf|殿|女}様は、この連隊にとって死の宣告です。帝国が私たちのことを知れば、私たちは皆、死を覚悟しなければなりません。つまり、御{mf|殿|女}様は、ザルコフで私たちにとって最大の脅威なのです。申し訳ありません、{name}ですが、この人たちを守るためには、その脅威を排除しなければなりません。御{mf|殿|女}様を排除するのです」
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski levels you with a grave look, as if coming to some kind of decision. Then he heaves a sigh.{/n} "Alas, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, you are a death sentence for the entire regiment. As soon as the Imperium finds out about us, we're all as good as dead. Which means that you are now the biggest threat to us on Zarkov. I'm sorry, {name}, but the only way to protect all these people is to eliminate that threat. To eliminate you."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski sana ciddiyetle bakıyor, sonra kendi kendine başını sallıyor.{/n} "Yeminimizi yenileme vakti geldi. Şimdi meydana gidiyoruz. Ölenlerin ve tüm halkımın huzurunda Sınav Karşılaşması'nda birbirimizle yüzleşeceğiz."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski sana ciddiyetle bakıyor, sonra kendi kendine başını sallıyor.{/n} "Yeminimizi yenileme vakti geldi. Şimdi meydana gidiyoruz. Ölenlerin ve tüm halkımın huzurunda Sınav Karşılaşması'nda birbirimizle yüzleşeceğiz."

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基神情凝重地看着你，然后自顾自地点了点头。{/n}“时候到了，该重申誓言了。我们现在就去广场，在逝者和所有人的见证下，我们将在试炼比武中对阵。”
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

traits.locale_text: {n}巴托什斯基神情凝重地看着你，然后自顾自地点了点头。{/n}“时候到了，该重申誓言了。我们现在就去广场，在逝者和所有人的见证下，我们将在试炼比武中对阵。”

languages.text: {n}Batoshski sieht dich ernst an und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Es wird Zeit, unseren Eid zu erneuern. Wir werden jetzt auf den Platz gehen und in Gegenwart der Gefallenen und meiner Leute im Prüfungkskampf gegeneinander antreten."
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski sieht dich ernst an und nickt schließlich.{/n} "Es wird Zeit, unseren Eid zu erneuern. Wir werden jetzt auf den Platz gehen und in Gegenwart der Gefallenen und meiner Leute im Prüfungkskampf gegeneinander antreten."

languages.text: {n}Batoshski vous regarde d'un air grave, puis hoche la tête.{/n} « L'heure est venue de renouveler notre serment. Nous allons nous rendre sur la place et, en présence de tous les membres de mon régiment, qu'ils soient morts ou vivants, nous nous affronterons lors de l'Épreuve par les armes. »
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski vous regarde d'un air grave, puis hoche la tête.{/n} « L'heure est venue de renouveler notre serment. Nous allons nous rendre sur la place et, en présence de tous les membres de mon régiment, qu'ils soient morts ou vivants, nous nous affronterons lors de l'Épreuve par les armes. »

languages.text: {n}Batoshski te observa con seriedad antes de asentir.{/n} «Ha llegado el momento de renovar nuestro juramento. Vamos a la plaza. En presencia de los caídos y de mi gente, nos enfrentaremos en la prueba de combate».
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski looks gravely at you, then nods to himself.{/n} "The time has come to renew our oath. We are going to the square now, and in the presence of the fallen and all my people, we shall face each other in the Trial Match."

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski te observa con seriedad antes de asentir.{/n} «Ha llegado el momento de renovar nuestro juramento. Vamos a la plaza. En presencia de los caídos y de mi gente, nos enfrentaremos en la prueba de combate».
